summary.para:
Sets whether this
keeps their tasks when they are marked as no longer needed by
or gets cleaned up by the mission script. Despite the property name, this property does not determine whether permanent events can interrupt the
's tasks (e.g. seeing hated peds or getting shot at).

If set to
, this
's task will be immediately cleared and start some ambient tasks (most likely start wandering) when they are marked as no longer needed.

If set to
, this
will keep their task until they have nothing to do (where their task stacks only contains CTaskDoNothing ). Once this
has nothing to do, their task will clear and they'll start some ambient tasks (one-time-only).
